name: Kalamarakia (Greek Squid)
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash the squid thoroughly and remove the soft backbone and ink sack from each head.
2. Remove the black membrane from the entire squid.
3. Coat the squid with flour and sprinkle with salt.
4. Heat olive oil in a heavy skillet.
5. Fry the squid until brown.
6. Pour wine over the squid, stir, then turn off the heat.
7. Add lemon juice and stir.
8. Let the squid stand in the sauce for ten minutes, then drain.
9. Arrange on a hot serving dish.
10. Serve on small individual plates with forks.
